title: PS3 Waves Tool
description: A .bat tool for editing lines.qrc file from PS3's firmware, which is XMB wave.

title: godot-vita
description: A Godot Engine 3.5 modification that allows you write your own games for PSVita!

title: PS3GameExtractor
description: Tool to decrypt/unpack PS3-related files, such as PKG, PUP, PSARC! (RUS)
